assets.purpose: Scored quality criteria the routing deliverable must meet (evidence grounding, lowest-permission, validation limits, fallback, secret boundary, guardian gate).
Allowed runtime ids and their permission levels; the lowest-permission ranking the router minimizes over.
What may ground a capability claim and which sources promote a capability to 'supported'.
Supported / pending / unsupported axes and the model-vs-repo promotion rule.
Requires a local-first fallback with a no-auth path and visible limits.
Shape and invariants of a valid route decision report, making the route machine-checkable.
